sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8191" key="a)ne/leos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέλεος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8191.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unmerciful,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Jac.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
